title: Result - Netherlands
content:
Welcome to the Netherlands, a vibrant country of 12 provinces, with only North and South Holland forming "Holland." Known for its flat terrain, a quarter of the land lies below sea level, featuring rivers, canals, polders and dunes.
Smaller than Nova Scotia, it boasts a dense population, a temperate climate and an excellent biking culture. Explore Amsterdam’s iconic canals, museums and nightlife, or discover unique attractions in Rotterdam and Utrecht. With a strong economy and multilingual citizens—90% fluent in English—the Netherlands is a global hub of culture, innovation and trade.

## Unique food tradition
Stroopwafels (waffle cookie): syrup waffles made with 2 paper-thin coaster sized thin waffles sandwiched together with a layer of cinnamon-caramel syrup.
The Dutch workforce boasts one of the highest English proficiency rates globally, making the Netherlands an attractive destination for international professionals.

### Local legend or myth
The Ghost of Castle Muiderslot: a legend from Muiden about a ghostly figure of a woman seen walking the castle grounds, believed to be the spirit of a former lady of the castle.

### Language of the Land
The Netherlands has 2 official languages, Dutch and Frisian. However, the average Dutch citizen speaks more than 3 languages and over 90% of the population is fluent in English.
million bicycles are in the Netherlands, outnumbering the population.
